name: The Ministry
description: A concrete building. A government department. Everyone smiles, everyone files reports, and everyone pretends to believe. But in Section 4-B of the Department of Truth, a small conspiracy is forming — and someone has already filed an anonymous report.

preview_npcs.name: Edmund Ralfe
preview_npcs.description: An archivist who has spent ten years correcting historical records. He has only recently understood what 'correcting' means — and cannot un-know it.

preview_npcs.name: Vera Cole
preview_npcs.description: Junior researcher. Brilliant, reckless, idealistic. She is already in the conspiracy. She just hasn't told anyone yet.

preview_npcs.name: Director Osman Pryce
preview_npcs.description: Warm, helpful, genuinely believes in the Party. He has filed seventeen reports in the last month. He considers this a form of love.

preview_npcs.name: Tom Parsons
preview_npcs.description: Senior clerk. Cheerful, devoted, guileless. He has been unknowingly carrying forbidden documents for two weeks. He would report himself if he knew.

preview_npcs.name: Dr. Lena Syme
preview_npcs.description: Analyst. Sees everything with perfect clarity — including the fact that people like her tend to disappear. She finds this philosophically interesting.
